response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with robust backend and distributed systems expertise, but he lacks the executive leadership experience required for this CTO role. The position mandates a track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, communicating with boards, and overseeing hybrid engineering models, none of which are evident in his IC-focused background. Additionally, while he has some recent exposure to AI tooling, he lacks the deep, production-grade multi-agent architectural experience specific to algorithmic fintech required for this position.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput microservices, including handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at Google.
Relevant domain exposure in fintech and pricing optimization from engineering tenures at RIDE Capital and Meta.
concerns: Zero demonstrated executive leadership or experience managing and scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks experience with board-level communication, strategic organizational design, and governing outsourced engineering partners.
Insufficient depth in architecting production-grade, stateful multi-agent AI systems for real-time credit risk and algorithmic trading.
